family_focus: Read config, build a script, and document the workflow end to end.
task_shape: Stateful multi-step automation over local config plus generated artifacts.
selection_reason: Kept because it is a compact workflow reference with sequential dependencies and multiple result artifacts, even though it is API-driven rather than browser-driven.
constraints: read the config first, then create both code and notes artifacts
notes: This family covers workflow automation shape only; it is not a real browser UI benchmark.

variants.summary: Use a config file to generate both an API-calling script and a process note.
